title: HAR/EWMA realized-vol forecast feeding the vol-target denominator
source: Alpha-avenue review 2026-05-29 (quant-phd-advisor, literature-grounded). Directional prediction exhausted (9 nulls); non-directional risk premia untested. See agent review for citations.
why: Direction is unforecastable for us; VOLATILITY is (HAR/Corsi well-established). Forecasting next-period vol to size the survival book tightens realized portfolio vol -> raises Sharpe via the DENOMINATOR. The most defensible use of our unused M15/H1 data, and it helps even the 5-day sprint (Sharpe contest = variance minimization).
scope: Build a HAR/EWMA realized-vol forecaster on H1 (PIT-safe, no lookahead).
Backtest survival-book sizing with the forecast vol-target vs the current trailing-realized-vol sizing.
Success = realized portfolio vol reduction >10% (free Sharpe lift). Then wire into compute_survival_target sizing.

history.reason: backlog: log non-directional alpha avenues (B0100-B0102) from PhD review

Pre-flight DONE (scripts/preflight_har_vol_sizing.py): HAR-on-H1-RV vol forecast vs trailing-realized-vol sizing, OOS. Reduces realized vol on ALL 8 assets (BTC -21%, USDJPY -16%, XAG -9%). Equal-weight PORTFOLIO: realized vol 4.49%->4.13% (-8.2%, just under the 10% bar) BUT vol-of-vol -17% (steadier) and maxDD -5.23%->-4.57% (-13%). VERDICT: modest-but-real, consistent, FREE (uses existing H1 data, no new instruments, no directional bet), and helps even the 5-day Sharpe contest (steadier denominator). RECOMMEND wiring into compute_survival_target sizing (TDD).
Pre-flight passed: consistent vol + vol-of-vol + drawdown reduction, deployable on the competition venue (no new instruments), helps the sprint -> highest-value actionable alpha-adjacent improvement.
research(alpha): two pre-flights + Syphonix perp-access verdict

NULL through the real SSOT. The standalone pre-flight showed -8.2% realized vol, but re-validating through compute_survival_target (the actual book: inverse-vol + crypto cap + portfolio vol-target + 0.5x leverage cap, DAILY rebalance, n=1565d) gives only +1.0% vol reduction and a SLIGHTLY WORSE Sharpe (0.510->0.486). Root cause: the survival book is LEVERAGE-CAP-BOUND (k pinned at max_leverage 0.5, realized vol ~3% << 6% target), not vol-bound -> a better vol forecast does not change sizing. HAR helps a vol-bound book; ours is leverage-bound by design (conservative). Capability KEPT but OFF: daily_realized_variance + har_vol_forecast + compute_survival_target(vol_forecast=) are tested + parity-safe (vol_forecast=None is byte-identical) for a future vol-bound config; validate_har_ssot.py reproduces the null. NOT wired into the live loop, NOT armed.
